---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


## EMB snRNAseq

### EMB QC and metadata
[link](QC_and_metadata.html)

### EMB snRNAseq - relative abundances, cell counts, T cell and Inflammation status categorization
[link](Relative_abundances_cellcounts_Tcell_groups.html)

### EMB snRNAseq - cell annotation all clusters with FeaturePlots 
[link](Markers_Cellannotation_Feature_Plots_EMB_v2.html)

### EMB snRNAseq - cell annotation immune cell clusters with Feature Plots
[link](PBMCs_snRNAseq_Immune_cells_GSEA_annotation.html)

### EMB MILO R Plot Differential abundance and neighbourhood immune cells


### EMB snRNAseq - GREM2 expression all cell clusters


### EMB snRNAseq - GREM2 expression immune cell clusters


### EMB - DE Genes accross all cell clusters Inflamed vs. Non-inflamed - Volcano Plots
[link](EMB_DEGenes_snRNAseq_Volcanov2.html)


## PBMCs scRNAseq 

### PBMCs cell annotation with Feature Plots and Hallmark GSEA

[link](PBMCs_cell_annotation_markers_and_FeaturePlots_v.1.3.html)


## TCRM immune cell isolation (pending)
